regulations.title: Italian Plastic Tax
regulations.summary: Board approved Mater-Bi film transition eliminating EUR 171,000 liability; Huhtamaki trial April–June 2026.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: Glass bottle reuse modelling in progress; CONAI consortium partnership under evaluation.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: D.Lgs. 8/2026 confirmed ANAC enforcement from July 2026; PwC Italy assurance engagement confirmed.

regulations.title: EU Taxonomy Regulation — Article 8 Disclosures
regulations.summary: Parma Pasta kiln in second efficiency quartile; transition plan required for E1 substantial contribution claim.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive
regulations.summary: MIMIT consultation paper published February 2026; farm and cooperative contracts under review.
